title: K-200 Battery Environmental Test Report
text:
# K-200 Battery Environmental Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-407-A. Revision: A. Type: risk-register. Author: Nina Schulz. Created: 2023-03-18. Last modified: 2024-01-30. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Battery subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1085, P-1111, P-1028, P-1003.
